stemHtml: An aircraft is cruising at 7000 ft and has to descend from a Top of Descent at 7000 ft to 2000 ft, where the approach at the destination aerodrome will commence. The maximum rate of descent is 1000 ft/min and the average ground speed during the descent is 180 kt. What should be the minimum horizontal distance between the Top of Descent and the destination aerodrome, so as to be at 2000 ft 10 NM from the destination aerodrome?
